## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Valentina Giraldo's background and potential fit for a role at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Valentina has experience in both external (client-facing) and internal growth, with strong skills in process automation and data management](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Jason is looking for support in client communication, community management, and various growth/marketing projects](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [The role involves a mix of EA tasks, client support, and automation, with an emphasis on personalized communication](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Topics

### Valentina's Background

  - [Graduated 3 years ago from European business school, focusing on finance, marketing, and management](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Started career as a growth manager for a Colombian e-commerce startup](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Transitioned to internal growth, focusing on process improvement and automation](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Most recent role at a plastic surgery clinic, where she implemented various data management and automation systems](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Strong interest in technology and data science](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

### Jason's Role and GrowthX.ai

  - [Leads growth at GrowthX.ai, focusing on marketing and service development](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Works with high-value clients, requiring white-glove marketing approaches](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Emphasis on AI optimization for client products](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Background in technical growth roles and startup experience](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

  - [Event planning and assistance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Backlink and broker tracking](https://fathom.video/share/cvnzT8isWiKGXsxDGsLBAxNDoxKTm_S5?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
